description: SIN Corp Server Hub cog for Red-DiscordBot.
install_msg: Use `[p]cog install sin-server-hub-cog sinserverhub`, then `[p]load sinserverhub`.
end_user_data_statement: This repository contains Red-DiscordBot cogs. See each cog's info.json for end user data statements.
